meta.title: Security
meta.description: Security contact and vulnerability reporting policy for Uha.

page.title: Security
page.intro: Uha is a privacy-first iOS app. We keep the public website and discovery endpoints small, explicit, and easy to inspect.
page.reporting_body: If you believe you found a security issue in Uha, the website, or a public service operated for Uha, contact mail@uha.app. Please include the affected URL or app area, steps to reproduce, and the expected impact.
page.scope_body: In scope: uha.app, public discovery endpoints, the Uha iOS app, and public services operated for Uha. Out of scope: social engineering, spam, denial-of-service testing, and attacks against third-party services.
page.policy_body: Please give us a reasonable amount of time to investigate and fix the issue before public disclosure. We do not offer a paid bug bounty, but we appreciate responsible reports and will credit researchers when appropriate.
